testcase.name: test_my_projects_requires_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 401/403, got 502 assert 502 in [401, 403] + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration54_ai_designer.py:200: in test_my_projects_requires_auth assert response.status_code in [401, 403], f"Expected 401/403, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401/403, got 502 E assert 502 in [401, 403] E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_my_projects_with_invalid_token

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 401/403, got 502 assert 502 in [401, 403] + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration54_ai_designer.py:210: in test_my_projects_with_invalid_token assert response.status_code in [401, 403], f"Expected 401/403, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401/403, got 502 E assert 502 in [401, 403] E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
